1: Boh(n)-zhoor, muh-syuh Doo-raw(n). Koh-maw(n) tah-lay voo?
Eel vah treh byeh(n). Eel eh taw(n) vah-kaw(n)ss.
Eel eh tah Lee-oh(n) ah-vek mah suhr.
2: Boh(n)-zhoor, mah-dahm. Ah-vay voo ewn shaw(n)br?
Wee, muh-syuh. Poor koh(n)-byeh(n) duh pair-son?
Voo-lay voo ewn sahl duh beh(n)?
3: Uh(n) nah-lay ruh-toor poor Lee-oh(n), seel voo pleh.
Aw(n) pruh-myair oo aw(n) duh-zyem klahs?
4: Noo zah-voh(n) day pum, day pwahr ay day zoh-raw(n)zh.
Zhuh veh praw(n)dr duh kee-loh duh pum.
5: Wee, aw(n) nee-vair eel pluh boh-koo.
8: Koh-maw(n) voo-lay voo kuh zhuh voo lay koop?
Pah troh koor, seel voo pleh.
9: Ewn boo-tay doh mee-nay-rahl, seel voo pleh.
10: Wee, zhuh leh ruh-sew suh mah-teh(n).
Noh(n), pah zaw(n)-kor. Zhuh veh luh fee-neer set ah-preh mee-dee.
15: Zhuh lay met-reh daw(n) zewn ay-kol pree-vay.
16: Noh(n), oh(n) nuh luh zhoo plew.
22: Wee, zhes-pair kuh not-ruh kaw(n)-dee-dah vah gah-nyay.
23: El suh port byeh(n), mahl-gray leh(n)-flah-syoh(n).
24: Fay-lee-see-tah-syoh(n)! Voo zah-vay tair-mee-nay luh koor.
Voo par-lay meh(n)-tuh-naw(n) treh byeh(n) fraw(n)-seh.
